x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA conversation volume and containment rate measure self-service effectiveness. Now Assist AI improves with more conversation data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Drive VA adoption through promotion and channel expansion. Track metrics via VA Analytics dashboard. Target: 1,000+ conversations and 60%+ containment rate for optimal Now Assist VA impact.
